text: Untitled written by Author Address Phone E-mail 1. INT ARJUN'S APARTMENT DAY Arjun is deep asleep with the alarm ringing next to him and his blanket covering his face. His mother yells from the kitchen. A few shots of the house and colony. MOM Arjun... levvu ra office ki time avthundhi!! ARJUN Maa... okka 5 minutes His mother comes to his room door and turns off the fan. MOM Veedu maradu. Arjun annoyingly gets up as his blanket falls of his face. ARJUN Next month EMI lo AC thiskovali... ee torture mari ekuva ayipoyindhi. Arjun gets off his bed. Plays a song on his phone. CUT TO: INT. WASHROOM He's brushing his teeth. CUT TO: INT. DINING TABLE He's eating his breakfast. CUT TO: INT. ROOM He's getting dressed for work. CUT TO: INT. HOUSE DOOR ARJUN Maa... velthuna bye! MOM Rey evening straight intiki ra! Mali koushik gaditho cigarette ani thirigavo! ARJUN Arey amma nenu cigarette thaguthana? Adhi koushik gadidhe promise. MOM Rey ne amma ni ra nenu, naku cheppaku ivvani! Arjun runs out to escape the conversation. ARJUN Sare sare, late avthundhi bye! 2. EXT ROAD DAY Arjun is on his bike, driving to work. He stops at a tea stall near his office, gets off and lights a cigarette. He's standing next to a guy at the tea stall, they look at each other, arjun gives an awkward smile and looks away. They again look back at each other and again arjun gives an awkward smile and looks away. ARJUN (TO HIMSELF) Pakka drug dealer veedu... Arjun finishes his cigarette. Gets back on his back and goes to his office. 3. INT ARJUN'S OFFICE He enters inside, gets to his desk and starts working. The day passes by, he doesn't really interact with anybody. After work, he gets on his bike and starts back to his house. 2. 4. EXT TEA STALL EVENING Arjun stops at the same tea stall again and lights another cigarette. The same person he met in the morning is again standing there in the same spot, they look at each other and arjun gives him an awkward smile again. Arjun looks away. ARJUN (TO HIMSELF) Enti veedu rojantha ikade untada... They look at each other again and awkward smile again. Arjun gets on his bike and goes back home. 5. INT ARJUN'S APARTMENT NIGHT Arjun is sitting at the dinning table having

arjun gives him an awkward smile again. Arjun looks away. ARJUN (TO HIMSELF) Enti veedu rojantha ikade untada... They look at each other again and awkward smile again. Arjun gets on his bike and goes back home. 5. INT ARJUN'S APARTMENT NIGHT Arjun is sitting at the dinning table having dinner with his mom. MOM Inkenti ra... how was your day? Arjun smirks. ARJUN Day aa... akada cheppukune antha jargindhi em ledhu amma... roju okate routine... illu nundi cigg... ahh office... office nundi illu MOM Ento asalu... sare kani neeku anjali gurthu undha? Arjun's eyes light up. MOM (CONT'D) Adhe ra ne chinnapati friend anjali. ARJUN Avunu enti ipudu? MOM Valu mali india ki move avthunaru anta, anjali vasthundhi first ikada anni set up cheyadaniki... (MORE) 3. MOM (CONT'D) vala parents oka 1-2 months lo vastharu anta... vala amma call chesindhi ivala. ARJUN Ohh avuna... MOM Adhi em reaction ra, ne best friend kada... happy avthav anukuna. ARJUN Ala em ledhu amma, sare nadhi ayipoyindhi kani room lo ki veltha. Arjun gets up and leaves. He enters his room and starts jumping around and dancing in excitement to a mass song. His mom is standing in the background and the music stops. She just gives a fed up look and walks away. Arjun is slightly embarrassed. ARJUN (CONT'D) Ah bokkale... He opens his cupboard and at the very end of the shelf there's a box that he pulls out. He opens the box and there's a picture of him and anjali as kids, and other small memories of anjali. Arjun sits down looking at that photo. ARJUN (VOICE OVER) (CONT'D) Anjali... na life lo one of the best chapters... 6. EXT APARTMENT COMPLEX PARK DAY The shot is showing the community and there's a park where kids are playing. ARJUN (V.O.) Oka 12 years mundhu, memu ikadki kothaga shift ayinapudu start ayindhi... Arjun who is 12 years old at the time is sitting there alone on a swing. 4. ARJUN (V.O.) (CONT'D) Naku general ga ne friends undaru, andlo mali kotha place... A ball comes rolling down to arjun. KID-1 Rey ball ivvu... Arjun kicks the ball back, but it goes a bit in the wrong direction. The kid gives him a disappointed look and chases the ball, nobody asks him to join them. Arjun sits back on the swing. ARJUN (V.O.) Ipudu ikada ela ra babu survive ayedhi anukuntunapudu...

Rey ball ivvu... Arjun kicks the ball back, but it goes a bit in the wrong direction. The kid gives him a disappointed look and chases the ball, nobody asks him to join them. Arjun sits back on the swing. ARJUN (V.O.) Ipudu ikada ela ra babu survive ayedhi anukuntunapudu... ANJALI Hi... nuvu ikadki kothaga ochava? ARJUN (V.O.) Apudu vachindhi na life lo ki... anjali. ANJALI Im anjali... nuvu? ARJUN Ah...im arjun. Anjali pulls out a kitkat from her pocket, breaks it into half and gives it to arjun. Arjun smiles and takes it. ANJALI Come lets play! Arjun gets up and walks with her. Anjali takes him to the group of kids and introduces him to them. CUT TO: EXT. PLAYGROUND All the kids are chatting with each other, arjun is in a corner listening to everything but doesn't say anything out. 5. ROHAN Meeku telusu nenu next week australia velthunanu... KID-1 Wow avuna... KID-2 Nuvvu epudu vacations ke velthu untava rohan? The kids start laughing around Anjali notices that arjun is feeling a bit out of place. ANJALI Arjun... nuvu vacation ki velali anukunte ekadki veldam anukuntunav? Arjun smiles. Arjun starts talking and feels included in the group. Arjun is looking at her and smiles. CUT TO: INT. ARJUN'S ROOM (PRESENT) Arjun is smiling and looking at the photo. ARJUN (V.O.) She always made sure i was never left out. It was like she heard me before even i said anything. CUT TO: EXT. PLAYGROUND Arjun and anjali playing together, chasing each other and laughing. CUT TO: INT. ROOM They're doing their homework together. CUT TO: 6. 7. INT ARJUN'S APARTMENT Young arjun is slowly sneaking out of his house in the evening. His mom yells from the kithcen. MOM Arjun... homework ayindha? Arjun runs out of the house. ARJUN Amma... anjali ni kalisi vachi homework cheskunta byeee... CUT TO: EXT. PLAYGROUND Anjali and arjun are sharing a kitkat again and just having the best time possible. CUT TO: INT. ARJUN'S BIRTHDAY PARTY Arjun's mom clicks a picture of arjun and anjali on her camera. CUT TO: INT. ARJUN'S ROOM (PRESENT) Arjun is going through all the stuff in that box. ARJUN (V.O.) Elano teledhu, one year ayipoyindhi and anjali was the most special person to me... i couldn't imagine a day without her... she made me feel things I never thought i would at that age. ARJUN

ARJUN'S ROOM (PRESENT) Arjun is going through all the stuff in that box. ARJUN (V.O.) Elano teledhu, one year ayipoyindhi and anjali was the most special person to me... i couldn't imagine a day without her... she made me feel things I never thought i would at that age. ARJUN Until... 7. 8. INT ARJUN'S APARTMENT Everybody is at the apartment gate, anjali and her family have their luggage packed and its getting loaded into a car. Arjun is standing behind his mother as he doesn't understand how to react to this. ARJUN (V.O.) Anjali vala father ki tranfer ayindhi... america ki... she was leaving that day... naku ela react avvalo artham kaledhu... i never felt something like that, it's like my heart was aching, kani baitaki chepukolenu. Anjali walks up to arjun. ANJALI Nannu marchipothava? ARJUN Never. ANJALI Bye arjun! Anjali smiles at him and starts walking away. She turns back and they share one last look, before she gets into the car. ARJUN (V.O.) And that... was my first heart break. 9. EXT TERRACE DAY (PRESENT) It's saturday morning arjun is on his building terrace with koushik. KOUSHIK Hmm... so ne childhood crush thirgi vasthundhi antav... ARJUN Yess! Apudu chepaleka poyindhi ipudu thanaki definte ga cheptha! 8. KOUSHIK Chepthavu sare... kani asalu thanu accept chesthundhi ani guarantee enti? ARJUN Ah? KOUSHIK Orey letha ni... idhi emana darling cinema anukuntunava? Aa ammayi edho ne kosame vasthunatu? Arjun is confused. KOUSHIK (CONT'D) Arey 12 years avthundhi ra meeru kalisi, things change. ARJUN Nenu ala ne unnanu ga... KOUSHIK Nuvvu vere ra babu, oka vintha jaathi anthe... andharu nee la undaru. ARJUN Ehe, confuse cheyaku... em chedamo cheppu. KOUSHIK Mundhu oka manchi bouquet konu, thanu ragane thanaki ivvu, inka dhani tharuvatha anni avve jargipothai. ARJUN Anthe antava? KOUSHIK Anthe ra! Inthaki thanu epudu vasthundhi? ARJUN Reppu night anta. 10. EXT APARTMENT LAWN AREA NIGHT Everyone is waiting for anjali to arrive, arjun is standing there with a bouquet of flowers in his hands, wearing his best shirt and perfume, dressed very neat. 9. MOM Abbo... ne favourite shirt esav enti? ARJUN Eh oorko amma neeku teledhu. A car comes and stops at the gate, anjali slowly gets down from the backdoor as her childhood friends go up to greet her. We don't entirely reveal anjali's face, just her features moving through the crowd from arjun's pov. Arjun gets really nervous as

Eh oorko amma neeku teledhu. A car comes and stops at the gate, anjali slowly gets down from the backdoor as her childhood friends go up to greet her. We don't entirely reveal anjali's face, just her features moving through the crowd from arjun's pov. Arjun gets really nervous as she's approaching closer, he turns around as his heart starts to beat faster and faster. Anjali approaches arjun's mother and greets her. ANJALI Aunty, arjun ekada?? Arjun's mom points towards arjun and anjali starts walking towards him. Arjun's heart starts pounding as he realizes that, he closes his eyes from brief moment and takes a deep breath. As anjali continues to walk towards arjun, only her feet are seen. INTERCUT WITH: EXT. PLAYGROUND Young anjali is walking towards arjun, matching the previous scene only her feet are seen. INTERCUT WITH: EXT. APARTMENT LAWN AREA Anjali is standing behind arjun as he continues to face the other side. INTERCUT WITH: EXT. PLAYGROUND Young anjali calls out to arjun. 10. ANJALI (YOUNG) Arjun!!! INTERCUT WITH: EXT. APARTMENT LAWN AREA Anjali calls out to arjun the same way. ANJALI Arjun? A close up on arjun and he opens his eyes instantly, takes a deep breath and turns around. We reveal anjali's face at that moment. Arjun has the biggest smile on his face after looking at her, it's like all his nervousness had just vanished. ARJUN Hi... anjali! They're both looking at each other and smiling. A wide shot of them standing together and a slow pull out. Arjun hands her the bouquet. ANJALI For me? Thank you so much! Arjun smiles. ARJUN Ela unnav anjali? Before arjun could finish saying something, someone else calls her and she walks away. ANJALI Just a second arjun... Leaving arjun hanging. He's standing there while his smile is fading away,eyes confused and body still, not being able to react to what has just happened. As this was clearly not the type of reunion he was expecting. A slow push in on arjun. CUT TO BLACK 11. ARJUN (V.O.) Asalu em jargindhi? END OF EPISODE 1 12. 13. 14.
